## Validation

- [ ] `python -m ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m mypy app`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated when setup, API behavior, or architecture changed
- [ ] No secrets, generated artifacts, or dependency folders committed
